name: Undistributed Capital Gains Tax Credit

eligibility.description: Applies when a RIC designates undistributed capital gains in a notice to shareholders; the shareholder must increase their share basis and claim the credit on their tax return.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Shareholders are treated as having paid the tax imposed on the RIC for undistributed capital gains, allowing the shareholder to claim a credit or refund for that tax on their own return.
